events.name: SELECT_BUILD_TYPE
events.description: Emits UI:{selectBuildTypeEvent} with {buildType} when player picks a building from the palette

events.name: PLACE_BUILDING
events.description: Emits UI:{placeBuildingEvent} with {x,y} on tile click when player places a building

events.name: GAME_END
events.description: Emits UI:{gameEndEvent} with {result} when the city reaches its goal or collapses

overridableConfigKeys.label: Asset Manifest

overridableConfigKeys.label: Build Types
overridableConfigKeys.description: Placeable building types shown in the build palette with cost.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Citizens
overridableConfigKeys.description: Roaming citizen units displayed on the isometric canvas.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Error
overridableConfigKeys.description: Error state (UiError)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Feature Sprites
overridableConfigKeys.description: Per-type sprite URL map for building features.

overridableConfigKeys.description: Initial building placements rendered as isometric-canvas features.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Starting Gold
overridableConfigKeys.description: Gold the player starts each game with

overridableConfigKeys.label: Gold Per Building

overridableConfigKeys.label: Grid Height
overridableConfigKeys.description: Number of rows in the tile grid

overridableConfigKeys.description: Number of columns in the tile grid
